AMD schedules earnings conference call

AMD said it will report quarterly results after the close and will host a conference call with investors and analysts immediately afterward. The company repeated that long-term investment priorities remain focused on AI, data center, and embedded markets while preserving operating discipline.

The release did not include new revenue guidance, but it reinforced that management expects investors to evaluate execution on product ramps and the pace of large customer deployments. The update offers context, but it is not a substitute for independent reporting or analyst revisions.
